description: Reviewer uploads call audio file and receives a compliance verdict
steps: Open frontend on /upload
Drop an mp3/wav file
Wait for transcription + analysis
Verify verdict appears with score, status, rule pass/fail breakdown

description: Reviewer browses call list and opens a call to inspect details
steps: Open /calls
Filter by status / supplier / date
Click a row
Verify transcript, checkpoints, audio playback all render

description: Reviewer claims a call for HITL review and releases on completion
steps: From a call detail page, click Claim
Verify only this reviewer can edit
Click Release
Verify another reviewer can claim it

description: Reviewer edits call metadata (agent name, supplier, script variant) and changes persist
steps: From call detail, edit Agent / Supplier / Script fields
Save
Reload
Verify values persisted and audit row written

description: Operator triggers replay (re-analysis) on a stored transcript without re-transcribing
steps: From call detail, click Reanalyze
Verify endpoint accepts and returns 202 within 1 s
Verify no new transcription cost incurred
Verify new verdict written with audit row

description: Reviewer can see an audit log of who did what and when across calls and rules
steps: Open /observability/audit
Filter by actor / action / date
Verify rows include actor, action, resource_id, ip, timestamp

description: Operator can see failed jobs (Inngest retry exhaustion) and replay them from the UI
steps: Force a pipeline failure on a test call (kill provider key)
Wait for retries to exhaust
Open /observability/stuck
Verify failed_jobs row appears with last_step + last_error
Click Replay → verify call re-runs from last successful step

description: Engineer sees uncaught exceptions in self-hosted GlitchTip with job_id tag and stack trace
steps: Deliberately raise an exception in a backend route in staging
Open GlitchTip UI
Verify exception appears within 30 s
Verify stack trace + job_id/call_id tag + request payload present

description: Operator opens Grafana dashboard and sees live pipeline / LLM / API / errors metrics
steps: Open Grafana (port 3001)
Open Pipeline dashboard → see step duration p50/p95/p99
Open LLM dashboard → see call rate + escalation rate
Open API dashboard → see RPS + error rate per route
Open Errors dashboard → see top exception types

description: Operator can search any call's logs end-to-end in Grafana Loki by job_id
steps: In Grafana → Explore → Loki
Query {compose_service="compliance-backend"} |= "job_id=<id>"
Verify every pipeline step is visible for that single call

description: Operator can restore Postgres from the most recent daily backup into a scratch DB
steps: Run scripts/restore_drill.sh
Verify scratch DB receives latest dump from Supabase Storage backups/ bucket
Verify table row counts match production within 24 h drift
Document drill in docs/durability.md

description: Engineer can rebuild VPS infra from tofu apply, with zero diff against live state
steps: cd infrastructure/hetzner
tofu init && tofu plan
Verify plan output shows 0 changes against live VPS
Document any required tofu import steps

description: Engineer cannot merge a PR unless pytest + vitest + coverage checks pass
steps: Open a PR with deliberately broken test
Verify test.yml + coverage.yml run
Verify Merge button is blocked
Fix test → verify checks pass and merge unblocks

description: Engineer cannot merge a PR that modifies prod code without a corresponding test edit in same branch
steps: Open PR modifying backend/app/routes.py with no test edit
Verify verification-before-completion gate fails
Add test edit to PR
Verify gate passes

description: Push to main triggers automatic deploy to amina VPS in under 5 minutes
steps: Merge a no-op PR to main
Watch deploy.yml run
Verify SSH step runs docker compose pull && up -d
Verify /healthz on amina returns 200 within 5 min of push

description: Engineer can swap storage backend (Supabase ↔ S3/MinIO) by changing one env var, no code change
steps: Set STORAGE_BACKEND=s3 + MinIO credentials in .env
Restart backend
Upload a call audio
Verify audio lands in MinIO bucket and signed URL playback works
Flip back to STORAGE_BACKEND=supabase, restart, verify same

description: Operator sees mean LLM cost per call drop ≥5× when tiered LLM + embedding pre-filter enabled
steps: Disable both flags, run 50 sample calls, record mean LLM cost
Enable embedding_prefilter_enabled + use_agent_analyzer
Run same 50 sample calls, record mean LLM cost
Verify ≥5× drop AND ≥98% verdict parity vs baseline
Flip flags in prod

description: Reviewer manages compliance rules catalog (add / edit / disable) with audit trail
steps: Open /rules
Add a new rule, edit existing, disable one
Verify changes persist
Verify audit_log rows created for each mutation

description: Reviewer manages scripts and script variants with versioning
steps: Open /scripts
Create a new script variant
Verify version number increments
Assign script to a call → verify checkpoint analysis uses it

description: Reviewer chats with agent assistant grounded in RAG (rules / LOAs / supplier docs)
steps: Open agent chat panel from a call
Ask question about a specific rule
Verify response cites the rule from RAG
Verify tool calls (search_rules / search_loas) visible in trace

description: Admin ingests new RAG sources (rules / supplier docs / LOAs / rejections) via admin UI
steps: Open /rag/admin
Upload a PDF or paste text
Verify chunks + embeddings written to pgvector
Verify search returns the new content

description: Operator imports a tracker XLSX file and exports verified data back
steps: Open /tracker/import
Upload XLSX → verify rows parsed
Edit a few rows in tracker UI
Export → verify XLSX matches edits

description: Reviewer manages deals lifecycle (intake → verified → resolved) across multiple calls
steps: Upload calls that share a customer
Verify same-deal grouping toggle works
Verify composite verdict spans all calls
Resolve deal → verify status propagates

description: Reviewer sees risk flags (vulnerable customer / pricing mismatch) on call detail
steps: Process a call with a known vulnerable-customer phrase
Verify VULNERABLE_CUSTOMER flag appears
Process a call with mismatched pricing
Verify PRICING_MISMATCH flag appears

description: Reviewer authenticates via Supabase Auth and HITL roles enforce route access
steps: Log out → verify protected routes redirect to login
Log in as reviewer → verify can access /calls and /hitl
Log in as non-reviewer → verify HITL routes return 403
